column1: # Pre-registered confirmatory corpus — Node/TypeScript arm. Committed BEFORE the run (see FROZEN.md).
# The Node analog of the JVM arm (~/git/candor-java/eval/corpus-confirmatory) and the Rust/Swift syscall
# arms (~/git/candor-{rust,swift}/soundness/confirmatory): a HELD-OUT, version-pinned corpus, a frozen
# classifier, one run, whatever it reports is the result — reported, not repaired.
# Columns: name<TAB>git_url<TAB>tag<TAB>testbin<TAB>testargs<TAB>role+why
#   testbin/testargs = the node_modules/.bin test runner invoked DIRECTLY (bypassing the package's own
#   `npm test`, which usually front-runs a linter/tsd step that has nothing to do with H and would abort
#   the suite). run_frozen.sh runs `node --import <preload> <testbin> <testargs>` in ONE node process, the
#   analog of the JVM arm driving JUnit's ConsoleLauncher in ONE JVM.
# role ∈ {H-test: performs effects in its OWN scanned functions (drives sound-complete/disclosed frames) |
#         vacuous-control: candor degrades EVERY frame to Unknown (dynamic fs-method reassignment) — a
#         disclosed-partial-only row with 0 sound-complete frames; included to SHOW where the Node arm's
#         check goes vacuous, not to inflate it}.
# EXCLUDED (developmental — used to calibrate / A-B / corpus-drive candor-ts; see FROZEN.md §Held-out):
#   the eval/sweep.sh set  — rimraf execa got ky zod p-queue globby del conf nanoid commander chalk
#   the corpus-round drivers (candor-ts-corpus memory) — prisma pg axios ioredis
# Every package below is a FRESH repo the classifier was never tuned against.
tmp
column6: H-test: makes real temp files/dirs itself (fs.open/mkdir) + crypto/Math.random for names — Fs+Rand in its own functions; mocha runs IN-PROCESS

column1: node-tar
column6: H-test: archives/extracts to real files (fs open/read/write), tmpdir + rng names — Fs/Rand/Env; tap FORKS each test file (attribution weaker — reported)

column1: get-port
column6: H-test: BINDS a real TCP socket (net.createServer().listen) to probe a free port — Net in its own function

column1: write-file-atomic
column6: H-test: writes to a temp path then rename()s — real Fs in its own function; tap forks

column1: node-which
column6: H-test: stat/access-walks PATH to resolve a binary — real Fs in its own function; tap forks

column1: proper-lockfile
column6: H-test: mkdir-based lockfile with staleness via Date.now() — Clock+Fs in its own functions; jest in-band

column1: mkdirp
column6: H-test: recursively mkdir()s real directories + reads env for tmp — Fs/Env; tap forks

column1: graceful-fs
column6: vacuous-control: REASSIGNS fs methods dynamically → candor degrades all 42 fns to Unknown → 0 sound-complete frames; shows where the Node arm's H-check is vacuous (disclosed-partial only)
